expressions.name: Spark
expressions.expression:
count    = static.sparkCount
button   = buttonVars.sparkON
selfBuzz = buttonVars.selfBuzz
arm      = buttonVars.armIgnition
sparkon  = 0  

button   = button or static.ignition

if arm == 1 then
 if selfBuzz == 1 and button == 1 then
    "DO:Spark" = 1
    "DO:Spark2" = 1
 endif

 if selfBuzz == 0 and button == 1 and arm == 1 then
    sparkon = 1
    if "DO:Spark" == 1 then
       "DO:Spark" = 0
       "DO:Spark2"= 0
    else
       "DO:Spark" = 1
       "DO:Spark2"= 1
    endif
 endif
else
 "DO:Spark" = 0
 "DO:Spark2" = 0
endif

if button == 0 then
   "DO:Spark" = 0
   "DO:Spark2" = 0
endif    

count = static.sparkCount
spark = "DO:Spark"
"DO:Igniter" = sparkon
sparkon

expressions.name: LOXFuelOutletControl
expressions.expression:
// Controls individually and together the LOX and Fuel outlet valves

runState  = static.testState
LOXOut    = buttonVars.LOXOutEn 
FuelOut   = buttonVars.FuelOutEn
both      = buttonVars.BothOutEn and not(lockout)

lockout = static.startLockout 

if ( runState ) then
    lockout = 1
else if (both == 0) then
    lockout = 0
endif
static.startLockout = lockout

goLOX = 0
goFuel = 0

if ( runState > 0 ) then
    if (static.LOXOut) then
        goLOX = 1
    endif
    if (static.FuelOut) then
        goFuel = 1
    endif
    static.mixLockout = 1
else 
    if ((LOXOut) or (both)) and lockout==0 then
        goLOX = 1
    endif
    if ((FuelOut) or (both)) and lockout==0 then
        goFuel = 1
    endif
endif
        
"DO:LOXOUT" = goLOX
"DO:FuelOUT" = goFuel

expressions.name: LOX Pressurization Controller
expressions.expression:
// LOX Press Controller

static.LOXRegDelta = 2
regDelta   = static.LOXRegDelta
manualVent = buttonVars.manualLOXVent or buttonVars.ventBoth

LOXPress = "AI:LOX P"
setP     = static.pressureSetPoint

enable = buttonVars.LOXPIDEn

LOX_Press_ON = 0
LOX_Vent_ON  = 0

if ((enable == 1 ) and (LOXPress < setP)) then
    LOX_Press_ON = 1
    LOX_Vent_ON  = 0
else if ((enable == 1) and (LOXPress > (setP + regDelta))) then
    LOX_Press_ON = 0
    LOX_Vent_ON  = 1
endif

if (manualVent != 0) then
    LOX_Press_ON = 0
    LOX_Vent_ON  = 1
endif

"DO:LOXVent"   = LOX_Vent_ON
"DO:LOX Press" = LOX_Press_ON

expressions.name: Fuel Pressurization Controller
expressions.expression:
// Fuel Press Controller

static.FuelRegDelta = 2
regDelta   = static.FuelRegDelta
manualVent = buttonVars.manualFuelVent or buttonVars.ventBoth

FuelPress = "AI:Fuel P"
setP     = static.pressureSetPoint

enable = buttonVars.FuelPIDEn

Fuel_Press_ON = 0
Fuel_Vent_ON  = 0

if ((enable == 1 ) and (FuelPress < setP)) then
    Fuel_Press_ON = 1
    Fuel_Vent_ON  = 0
else if ((enable == 1) and (FuelPress > (setP + regDelta))) then
    Fuel_Press_ON = 0
    Fuel_Vent_ON  = 1
endif

if (manualVent != 0) then
    Fuel_Press_ON = 0
    Fuel_Vent_ON  = 1
endif

"DO:FuelVent"   = Fuel_Vent_ON
"DO:Fuel Press" = Fuel_Press_ON

expressions.name: Test Sequencer
expressions.expression:
// Test Sequencer
// Uses a state machine to step through 
// shut off mixing, purge, mix on, pause, ignite
// run a set time, mix off, purge - done

static.testState      //idle

static.deltaTime     
static.preStartTime   = 1000
static.prePurgeTime   = 1000
static.ignitionTime   = 5000
static.postPurgeTime  = 5000
static.abortPurgeTime = 6000
static.mixOnPreBurn   = 2000
static.runTime        = 5000

static.ignition      // these output to control expressions that take in buttons or sequence output
static.LOXVent  
static.FuelVent 
static.Purge    
static.LOXOut   
static.FuelOut  

startTest = buttonVars.runTest
abort     = buttonVars.abort
purgeIn   = buttonVars.purge

IDLE      = 0
PRESTART  = 1
PREPURGE  = 2
STARTMIX  = 3
IGNITION  = 4
RUN       = 5
POSTPURGE = 6
ABORT     = 7

state     = static.testState
deltaT    = static.deltaTime

purge     = 0
mixon     = 0
igniton   = 0

if ( (abort or buttonVars.purge) and (state) and (state < ABORT) ) then
    static.deltaTime = 0
    state = ABORT
endif

if ( state == IDLE ) then    // IDLE
    if ( startTest > 0 ) then
        static.deltaTime = 0
        state=PRESTART
    endif
else if ( state == PRESTART ) then
    mixon = 0
    if ( deltaT > static.preStartTime ) then
        static.deltaTime = 0
        state = PREPURGE
    endif
else if ( state == PREPURGE ) then
    purge = 1
    if ( deltaT > static.prePurgeTime ) then
        state = STARTMIX
        static.deltaTime = 0
        purge = 0
    endif
else if ( state == STARTMIX ) then
    mixon = 1
    if ( deltaT > static.mixOnPreBurn ) then
        state = IGNITION
        static.deltaTime = 0
    endif
else if ( state == IGNITION ) then
    mixon = 1
    ignition = 1
    if ( deltaT > static.ignitionTime ) then
        static.deltaTime = 0
        state = RUN
    endif
else if ( state == RUN ) then
    mixon = 1
    if ( deltaT > static.runTime ) then
        static.deltaTime = 0
        state = POSTPURGE
    endif
else if ( state == POSTPURGE ) then
    purge = 1
    if ( deltaT > static.postPurgeTime ) then
        static.deltaTime = 0
        state = IDLE
    endif
else if ( state == ABORT ) then
    purge = 1
    if ( deltaT > static.abortPurgeTime ) then
        static.deltaTime = 0
        state = IDLE
    endif
else
    state = IDLE
endif

if ( state > 0 ) then
    static.deltaTime = static.deltaTime + 7.5
endif

static.testState = state

static.ignition = ignition
static.LOXOut   = mixon
static.FuelOut  = mixon
static.Purge    = purge

static.testState

expressions.name: Vent Control
expressions.expression:
// LOX and Fuel Vent Control

LOXMan   = buttonVars.manualLOXVent
FuelMan  = buttonVars.manualFuelVent
LOXAuto  = static.LOXVent
FuelAuto = static.FuelVent
bothMan  = buttonVars.ventBoth

if LOXMan or LOXAuto or bothMan then
    "DO:LOXVent" = 1
endif

if FuelMan or FuelAuto or bothMan then
    "DO:FuelVent" = 1
endif

expressions.name: Purge Control
expressions.expression:
// Manual and Auto Purge Valve Controller

manPurge    = buttonVars.purge
autoPurge   = static.Purge

if manPurge or autoPurge then
    purge = 1
else
    purge = 0
endif

"DO:PURGE" = purge

expressions.name: sparkRef
expressions.expression:
// Write your expression here
sparkRef1 = static.ignition
sparkRef2 = buttonVars.sparkON
sparkRef = sparkRef1 or sparkRef2
